notes: Bug confirmed: DateTimePicker input fields not properly sized. Hour field accepts 3-digit input (e.g. '199') causing field width to expand beyond normal 2-digit size. Steps to reproduce: 1) Click hour field 2) Type '9' (field shows '19') 3) Type '9' again (field shows '199' - 3 digits). Field width expands to accommodate 3-digit value. Browser shows validation error 'value must be <= 23' but input not constrained. Additionally, after entering oversized value, date-time separator space doubles temporarily.
